perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white shirt and black pinafore dress, stands in a warehouse retail aisle holding a giant plush Kuromi head. (2) She presents different versions of the toy (Cinnamoroll and Pompompurin) sitting on a metal shelf. (3) The camera zooms into the product packaging which illustrates the inflation process and features. (4) She turns the plush over to reveal a pink air valve on the bottom. (5) She demonstrates the size and softness by hugging the toy and gesturing with her hands while smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music begins. A woman's voice and a man's voice engage in an enthusiastic dialogue; the woman is on-camera while the man acts as the narrator/interviewer. (2) The sound of the environment is quiet, focusing on the clear studio-quality dialogue and the continuous pop BGM. (3) No significant sound effects are used, except for the high-energy tone of the speakers discussing price and awards.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles tracking the spoken Chinese dialogue. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo at the top; '超大的抱抱球' (Huge hug ball) in colorful font; '打氣有工具' (Includes inflation tool) appearing as a variety-show style tag. (3) Information Text: '優秀賞' (Excellence Award) with a graphic badge; '799元' (799 Yuan) indicating price.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Product Feature Demonstration -> Detailed Instruction -> Benefits Summary

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 male voice/hand (off-camera), 1 female passerby in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long black hair wearing a white long-sleeved shirt under a black V-neck strap dress.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Costco toy aisle with industrial metal shelving, boxes of toys, and bicycles visible in the distance.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense studio lights / Bright warehouse lighting

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Presentation -> Benefit Logic -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and recommend the 'Biggies' Sanrio inflatable plush toys available at Costco, emphasizing their size, 'Excellence Award' status, and convenient storage feature to encourage viewers to purchase them.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product, price mention, and detailed feature explanation within a retail environment.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy interaction between an onscreen talent and an off-camera narrator.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video follows a popular social media format for 'store walkthroughs' or 'treasure hunting' at big-box retailers like Costco.
